title: Checkout returns 500 on Safari 17
description: Users on Safari 17 hit a 500 error at the payment confirmation step. Stripe webhook appears to fire but order is not persisted. Revenue-impacting.

title: Auth tokens expiring early in prod
description: Session tokens are expiring ~15 min instead of 24h after the latest deploy. Users forced to re-login repeatedly. Suspected clock/TTL misconfig.

title: Add SSO login (Google + Okta)
description: Enterprise customers require SSO. Implement OAuth2 with Google and Okta providers, plus account linking for existing email users.

title: Dashboard charts load slowly (>4s)
description: Analytics dashboard takes 4-6s to render on accounts with large datasets. Likely N+1 queries on the metrics endpoint. Needs profiling.

title: Migrate user service from REST to GraphQL
description: Consolidate the 8 user-related REST endpoints into a single GraphQL schema to reduce over-fetching and simplify the mobile client.

title: Add CSV export to reports page
description: Allow users to export any report table to CSV. Should respect current filters and column ordering.

title: Update API docs for v2 endpoints
description: The public API docs still reference v1 routes. Update all examples, request/response samples, and the authentication section for v2.

title: Clean up unused feature flags
description: Remove 12 stale LaunchDarkly flags that are fully rolled out or abandoned, and delete the dead code paths behind them.
